papers.title: From Pixels to Tokens: A Systematic Study of Latent Action Supervision for Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.abstract: Latent actions serve as an intermediate representation that enables consistent modeling of vision-language-action (VLA) models across heterogeneous datasets. However, approaches to supervising VLAs with latent actions are fragmented and lack a systematic comparison. This work structures the study of latent action supervision from two perspectives: (i) regularizing the trajectory via image-based latent actions, and (ii) unifying the target space with action-based latent actions. Under a unified VLA baseline, we instantiate and compare four representative integration strategies. Our results reveal a formulation-task correspondence: image-based latent actions benefit long-horizon reasoning and scene-level generalization, whereas action-based latent actions excel at complex motor coordination. Furthermore, we find that directly supervising the VLM with discrete latent action tokens yields the most effective performance. Finally, our experiments offer initial insights into the benefits of latent action supervision in mixed-data, suggesting a promising direction for VLA training. Code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 系统比较了视觉-语言-动作模型中潜在动作监督的四种策略，发现图像型潜在动作利于长程推理，动作型利于复杂运动协调，直接监督离散潜在动作令牌效果最佳。
analysis.research_motivation: 潜在动作作为异构数据集间一致建模的中间表示，但现有监督方法碎片化，缺乏系统比较，阻碍了VLA模型训练的统一理解。
analysis.problem: 如何系统比较和评估不同潜在动作监督策略对VLA模型性能的影响，并揭示其与任务类型的对应关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现公式化-任务对应关系：图像型潜在动作有利于长程推理和场景级泛化，动作型潜在动作擅长复杂运动协调；直接监督离散潜在动作令牌效果最佳。
analysis.method: 在统一VLA基线框架下，从两个视角（基于图像的潜在动作正则化轨迹、基于动作的潜在动作统一目标空间）实例化并比较四种代表性集成策略。
contributions: 系统梳理了潜在动作监督的两个视角和四种策略，提供了统一比较框架。
揭示了公式化-任务对应关系，为不同任务选择监督策略提供指导。
发现直接监督离散潜在动作令牌是最有效的策略，并初步验证了混合数据训练的优势。
analysis.experiments: 在统一VLA基线框架下，通过四种策略的比较实验验证了公式化-任务对应关系，并提供了混合数据训练的初步见解。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 实验仅在单一VLA基线框架下进行，可能不适用于其他架构。
混合数据训练的益处仅为初步见解，缺乏深入分析。

papers.title: Towards General Preference Alignment: Diffusion Models at Nash Equilibrium
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) has been popular for aligning text-to-image (T2I) diffusion models with human preferences. As a mainstream branch of RLHF, Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) offers a computationally efficient alternative that avoids explicit reward modeling and has been widely adopted in diffusion alignment. However, existing preference-based methods for diffusion alignment still rely on reward-induced preference signals and typically assume that human preferences can be adequately modeled by the Bradley--Terry (BT) model, which may fail to capture the full complexity of human preferences. In this paper, we formulate diffusion alignment from a game-theoretic perspective. We propose Diffusion Nash Preference Optimization (Diff.-NPO), an intuitive general preference framework for diffusion alignment. Diff.-NPO encourages the current policy to play against itself to achieve self improvement and lead to a better alignment. Empirically, we demonstrate the effectiveness of Diff.-NPO on the text-to-image generation task via various metrics. Diff.-NPO consistently outperforms existing preference-based diffusion alignment methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出扩散纳什偏好优化（Diff.-NPO），通过博弈论视角统一偏好对齐，在文本到图像生成中超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于偏好的扩散模型对齐方法依赖奖励信号和Bradley-Terry模型，无法捕捉人类偏好的复杂性，且计算效率有限。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种无需显式奖励建模、能捕捉复杂人类偏好的通用扩散模型对齐方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从博弈论角度出发，提出Diff.-NPO，通过让当前策略与自身对抗实现自我改进，从而对齐人类偏好。
contributions: 将扩散模型对齐问题形式化为博弈论框架，提出Diff.-NPO方法。
在文本到图像生成任务上，Diff.-NPO在多种指标上一致优于现有基于偏好的对齐方法。
analysis.experiments: 在文本到图像生成任务上通过多种指标验证有效性，但摘要未提供具体数据集或数值结果。
limitations: 可能仅在文本到图像任务上验证，未提及对其他模态的适用性。
博弈论框架的收敛性分析可能不充分。

papers.title: Covariance-Aware Goodness for Scalable Forward-Forward Learning
papers.abstract: The Forward-Forward algorithm eliminates global gradient flow and full network activations storage. However, in convolutional settings, existing BP-free FF methods significantly under-perform backpropagation on complex benchmarks such as ImageNet-100 and Tiny-ImageNet. We identify this gap as a structural bottleneck in goodness extraction: standard sum-of-squares formulation collapses feature volumes into channel-wise activation energies which omits critical second-order dependencies. To address this, we propose a framework centered on three key components. First, Bi-axis Covariance Goodness(BiCovG) explicitly augments the standard goodness function with structured second-order information along two axes: cross-channel projections that model inter-feature covariance, and nested multi-scale aggregation that encodes spatial correlation statistics. This provides a tractable approximation to covariance-aware goodness without the prohibitive O(C^2) complexity of explicit matrix estimation. Second, a lightweight Logistic Fusion module aggregates layer-wise predictions, amplifying the contribution of deeper representations. Third, the Feature Alignment Layer(FAL) introduces a zero-initialized correction at block boundaries to mitigate representation misalignment in deep locally trained networks. By introducing these three components, we effectively double the depth of viable Forward-Forward learning, extending robust layer utilization from shallow baselines to 16 layer architectures like VGG-16. The resulting BP-free model achieves 73.01% on ImageNet-100 and 50.30% on Tiny-ImageNet. As a practical extension, Hybrid Goodness Blocks control the scope of gradient propagation via configurable block sizes, further narrowing the ImageNet-100 gap to 3.6% and matching BP on Tiny-ImageNet, while still reducing peak memory by approximately 50% relative to BP.

analysis.tldr: 提出协方差感知的 goodness 函数，使无反向传播的 Forward-Forward 算法在深层 CNN 上达到接近 BP 的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: Forward-Forward 算法避免了全局梯度传播和全网络激活存储，但在卷积设置下性能远低于反向传播，限制了其在大规模基准上的应用。
analysis.problem: 现有 FF 方法中 goodness 提取存在结构性瓶颈：标准平方和形式将特征体积压缩为通道级激活能量，忽略了关键的二阶依赖关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准 sum-of-squares goodness 丢失了特征间的协方差信息，导致深层网络训练时表示不对齐，限制了网络深度。
analysis.method: 提出 Bi-axis Covariance Goodness (BiCovG) 显式增强二阶信息，包括跨通道投影和嵌套多尺度聚合；Logistic Fusion 模块聚合层间预测；Feature Alignment Layer (FAL) 纠正块边界表示偏移。
contributions: 提出 BiCovG 以可计算复杂度近似协方差感知的 goodness 函数
引入 Logistic Fusion 和 FAL 组件，使 FF 学习深度翻倍至 16 层
在 ImageNet-100 和 Tiny-ImageNet 上取得接近 BP 的性能，同时减少约 50% 峰值内存
analysis.experiments: 在 ImageNet-100 上达到 73.01%，在 Tiny-ImageNet 上达到 50.30%；Hybrid Goodness Blocks 进一步缩小与 BP 的差距至 3.6%（ImageNet-100）并匹配 BP（Tiny-ImageNet）。
limitations: Hybrid Goodness Blocks 仍需部分梯度传播，并非完全 BP-free
方法在更大规模数据集上的表现未知

papers.title: Learning-based Statistical Refinement for Denoising
papers.abstract: This work proposes a learning-based statistical refinement method for improving the denoising results of a given denoiser without knowing the precise noise distribution or accessing clean images or calibration data. While there are many existing successful denoising approaches for handling different kinds of noise, they typically require accurate modelling of the images and the noise (implicitly or explicitly), and hence the denoising results can be suboptimal due to different practical factors such as imperfect models, unreliable noise assumptions, or low quality data. In particular, when clean image samples are not available and there is a lack of knowledge of the underlying noise distribution, which is the case in various practical situations, the results may not well align with the noise statistics. The unawareness of the useful statistical information leads to suboptimal results. This work aims to make the best use of the statistical information to improve the consistency between the given denoising results and the noise statistics, under the assumption that the noise is conditionally pixel-wise independent given the clean signal. A method, based on a Bayesian formulation of an auxiliary signal in the noisy data, is proposed for evaluating the consistency of the denoising results, without precise information on noise distribution. By leveraging the statistical information from noisy data, the method enhances the statistical noise consistency and improves denoising quality.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于学习的统计精炼方法，在无干净图像和噪声分布先验的情况下提升去噪结果与噪声统计的一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有去噪方法通常需要精确的图像和噪声建模，但在实际中由于模型不完善、噪声假设不可靠或数据质量低，去噪结果可能次优，尤其当无法获取干净图像且噪声分布未知时，结果与噪声统计特性不一致。
analysis.problem: 在不知道精确噪声分布且无干净图像或校准数据的情况下，如何利用噪声数据中的统计信息来改进给定去噪器的去噪结果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，当缺乏干净样本和噪声分布知识时，去噪结果往往与噪声统计特性不一致，导致次优性能。
analysis.method: 基于贝叶斯公式，在含噪数据中引入辅助信号，利用条件像素独立假设评估去噪结果与噪声统计的一致性，并通过学习方式精炼去噪结果。
contributions: 提出一种无需干净图像或噪声分布先验的统计精炼方法，可改进任意给定去噪器的结果。
基于贝叶斯框架和条件像素独立假设，设计了一种评估去噪结果与噪声统计一致性的方法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 方法依赖于噪声条件像素独立假设，可能不适用于相关噪声场景。
未讨论计算开销或对复杂噪声类型的适用性。

papers.title: Awaking Spatial Intelligence in Unified Multimodal Understanding and Generation
papers.abstract: We present JoyAI-Image, a unified multimodal foundation model for visual understanding, text-to-image generation, and instruction-guided image editing. JoyAI-Image couples a spatially enhanced Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) with a Multimodal Diffusion Transformer (MMDiT), allowing perception and generation to interact through a shared multimodal interface. Around this architecture, we build a scalable training recipe that combines unified instruction tuning, long-text rendering supervision, spatially grounded data, and both general and spatial editing signals. This design gives the model broad multimodal capability while strengthening geometry-aware reasoning and controllable visual synthesis. Experiments across understanding, generation, long-text rendering, and editing benchmarks show that JoyAI-Image achieves state-of-the-art or highly competitive performance. More importantly, the bidirectional loop between enhanced understanding, controllable spatial editing, and novel-view-assisted reasoning enables the model to move beyond general visual competence toward stronger spatial intelligence. These results suggest a promising path for unified visual models in downstream applications such as vision-language-action systems and world models.

analysis.tldr: JoyAI-Image 通过空间增强的 MLLM 与 MMDiT 耦合，实现统一的多模态理解与生成，并展现出更强的空间智能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有统一多模态模型在空间感知与可控生成方面存在不足，难以支撑视觉-语言-动作系统等下游应用。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个既能进行视觉理解又能进行文本到图像生成与编辑的统一模型，并提升其几何感知与空间推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 JoyAI-Image，将空间增强的 MLLM 与 MMDiT 耦合，通过共享多模态接口实现感知与生成的交互；并设计可扩展的训练方案，融合统一指令微调、长文本渲染监督、空间接地数据及编辑信号。
contributions: 提出一种统一多模态基础模型架构，耦合空间增强 MLLM 与 MMDiT。
构建可扩展的训练方案，集成多种监督信号以增强空间智能。

papers.title: HERCULES: Hardware-Efficient, Robust, Continual Learning Neural Architecture Search
papers.abstract: Neural Architecture Search (NAS) has emerged as a powerful framework for automatically discovering neural architectures that balance accuracy and efficiency. However, as AI transitions from static benchmarks to real-world deployment, the traditional focus on hardware-aware efficiency is no longer sufficient. We observe that modern NAS methods, especially those that target edge AI, are evolving to address a triple objective: Efficiency, Robustness, and Continual Learning. While efficiency ensures feasibility in resource-constrained environments, robustness guarantees reliability under environmental variabilities, and continual learning enables adaptation to sequential tasks without catastrophic forgetting. We propose a taxonomy of NAS approaches through this triple lens, distinguishing between methods targeting resource optimization, environmental resilience, and architectural plasticity. This unified perspective reveals that these axes, though often studied in isolation, are mutually reinforcing. Building on this taxonomy, we map the current landscape of these NAS methods into a new framework called Hardware-Efficient, Robust, and ContinUal LEarning Search (HERCULES). We define the desiderata, the twelve labours of HERCULES, addressing the non-trivial challenge of balancing an adequate search-space exploration with the immense computational costs of a multi-objective NAS, accounting for these crucial objectives of current AI systems. By identifying critical gaps in existing research, this survey outlines a roadmap toward integrated algorithmic, architectural, and hardware-software co-design for truly deployable, lifelong-learning AI systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出HERCULES框架，系统综述面向硬件效率、鲁棒性和持续学习的神经架构搜索方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统NAS仅关注硬件效率，但实际部署需要同时满足效率、鲁棒性和持续学习三重目标，现有研究孤立处理这些维度，缺乏统一视角。
analysis.problem: 如何系统分类和整合面向效率、鲁棒性和持续学习的NAS方法，并识别关键研究空白。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出效率、鲁棒性和持续学习三个目标虽然常被单独研究，但实际上是相互促进的。
analysis.method: 提出HERCULES框架，通过三重透镜（效率、鲁棒性、持续学习）对现有NAS方法进行分类，并定义十二项关键挑战（十二项任务）。
contributions: 提出HERCULES分类框架，统一分析效率、鲁棒性和持续学习三个维度的NAS方法。
识别现有研究中的关键空白，并规划集成算法、架构和软硬件协同设计的路线图。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 作为综述，未提出新的NAS算法或实验验证。
框架的实用性需后续研究验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HERCULES框架，系统综述面向硬件效率、鲁棒性和持续学习的神经架构搜索方法。

papers.title: Connecting online criminal behavior with machine learning: Using authorship attribution to analyze and link potential online traffickers
papers.abstract: This research investigated how online criminal activities can be better understood and connected using data-driven machine learning methods. Many illegal activities, such as human trafficking and illicit trade, have moved to online platforms where offenders hide behind anonymous accounts and frequently change identities. This makes it difficult for authorities to understand how large these networks are and how different online profiles may be linked. The research shows that people tend to maintain consistent patterns in how they write advertisements and present images online, even when they try to stay anonymous. By analysing these patterns across large collections of online advertisements, the research demonstrates how to link related accounts and identify repeated behaviour across illegal online markets. In addition, the research also addresses how such methods should be used responsibly. It proposes clear guidelines to ensure that privacy, fairness, and transparency are respected when these tools are applied. Overall, the research provides practical ways to support law enforcement investigations while emphasising careful and ethical use.

analysis.tldr: 利用作者归属分析技术，通过写作和图像模式关联匿名在线犯罪账号，并提出了负责任使用的伦理指南。
analysis.research_motivation: 在线犯罪活动（如人口贩卖、非法交易）利用匿名账号和频繁更换身份逃避追踪，执法部门难以识别网络规模和账号关联，亟需数据驱动的方法来揭示隐藏的犯罪网络。
analysis.problem: 如何通过机器学习方法分析在线广告中的写作和图像模式，自动关联匿名犯罪账号，并确保方法的伦理使用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，即使试图保持匿名，人们在撰写广告和发布图像时仍会保持一致的风格模式，这为跨账号关联提供了可检测的信号。
analysis.method: 采用作者归属分析（authorship attribution）技术，提取广告文本和图像中的风格特征，通过模式匹配链接不同账号，同时提出隐私、公平和透明度的使用指南。
contributions: 展示了通过写作和图像模式关联匿名在线犯罪账号的可行性
提出了负责任使用此类方法的伦理指南，确保隐私、公平和透明度
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖广告数据的可用性和质量，实际执法部署需进一步验证
伦理指南的具体实施效果和通用性有待评估
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用作者归属分析技术，通过写作和图像模式关联匿名在线犯罪账号，并提出了负责任使用的伦理指南。

papers.title: Improving Medical VQA through Trajectory-Aware Process Supervision
papers.abstract: Reasoning capabilities are crucial for reliable medical visual question answering (VQA); however, existing datasets rarely include reasoning explanations. We address this by generating reasoning trajectories for six medical VQA benchmarks using the COMCTS algorithm with open-source vision-language models, with an LLM serving as the verification judge. Building on these generated datasets, we propose a two-stage training framework: supervised fine-tuning followed by Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) with a novel process-based reward. While standard approaches rely solely on exact-match rewards for final answers, we introduce a trajectory-aware reward that measures the similarity between generated and ground-truth reasoning processes. Specifically, we embed reasoning steps using sentence transformers and compute the Dynamic Time Warping (DTW) distance between the resulting vector sequences. Experiments across six benchmarks demonstrate that combining the DTW-based process reward with exact-match reward consistently outperforms SFT-only training, raising mean accuracy from 0.598 to 0.689, mean BERTScore from 0.845 to 0.881, and mean ROUGE-L from 0.665 to 0.748. Our results highlight the importance of process supervision in training reasoning-capable medical VLMs. We make our code and generated reasoning datasets publicly available at this https URL

analysis.tldr: 通过轨迹感知过程监督提升医学VQA的推理能力，结合DTW奖励与GRPO训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学视觉问答需要推理能力，但现有数据集缺乏推理解释，限制了模型可靠性。
analysis.problem: 如何生成推理轨迹并利用过程监督训练医学VLM以提升VQA性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 仅使用最终答案的精确匹配奖励不足以引导模型学习正确推理过程。
analysis.method: 使用COMCTS算法生成推理轨迹，LLM作为验证器；两阶段训练：SFT + GRPO，引入基于DTW距离的轨迹感知过程奖励。
contributions: 为六个医学VQA基准生成推理轨迹数据集并开源。
提出结合DTW过程奖励与精确匹配奖励的GRPO训练框架，显著提升性能。
analysis.experiments: 在六个基准上，平均准确率从0.598提升至0.689，BERTScore从0.845至0.881，ROUGE-L从0.665至0.748。
limitations: 依赖开源VLM和LLM作为验证器，可能引入偏差。
DTW距离计算开销较大，可能影响训练效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过轨迹感知过程监督提升医学VQA的推理能力，结合DTW奖励与GRPO训练。

papers.title: Lookahead Drifting Model
papers.abstract: Recently, a new paradigm named \emph{drifting model} has been proposed for mapping distributions, which achieves the SOTA image generation performance over ImageNet via one-step neural functional evaluation (NFE). The basic idea is to compute a drifting term at each training iteration and then push the output of the model towards the direction of the drifting term. In this paper, we propose a \emph{lookahead drifting model}. At each training iteration, we compute a set of drifting terms sequentially. Each drifting term is calculated by making use of previously computed ones as well as the positive samples and the output of the model. %One key step is to properly scale the drifting terms so that their magnitudes are in a comparable range. In principle, the drifting terms obtained at a later stage capture higher order gradient information towards the positive samples. At each training iteration, the model is optimized by pushing its output towards the direction of the (weighted) summation of the drifting terms. Experimental results on toy examples and CIFAR10 demonstrate the better performance of the new method than the baseline.

analysis.tldr: 提出Lookahead Drifting Model，通过顺序计算多个漂移项改进分布映射，在CIFAR10上优于基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有漂移模型在一步神经函数评估中实现SOTA图像生成，但仅使用单一漂移项，可能未充分利用高阶梯度信息。
analysis.problem: 如何通过多个漂移项捕获更高阶梯度信息以提升分布映射性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在每次训练迭代中顺序计算一组漂移项，每个漂移项利用先前计算的漂移项、正样本和模型输出，最终通过加权求和优化模型。
contributions: 提出Lookahead Drifting Model，通过顺序计算多个漂移项捕获高阶梯度信息。
在玩具示例和CIFAR10上验证了优于基线漂移模型的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在玩具示例和CIFAR10数据集上进行实验，显示新方法优于基线。
limitations: 摘要未提供大规模数据集（如ImageNet）的实验结果。
未讨论计算开销和收敛性分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Lookahead Drifting Model，通过顺序计算多个漂移项改进分布映射，在CIFAR10上优于基线。

papers.title: Continual Distillation of Teachers from Different Domains
papers.abstract: Deep learning models continue to scale, with some requiring more storage than many large-scale datasets. Thus, we introduce a new paradigm: Continual Distillation (CD), where a student learns sequentially from a stream of teacher models without retaining access to earlier teachers. CD faces two challenges: teacher training data is unavailable, and teachers have varying expertise. We show that external unlabeled data enables Unseen Knowledge Transfer (UKT), allowing the student to acquire information from domains not present in the training data, while known to the teacher. We also show that sequential distillation causes Unseen Knowledge Forgetting (UKF) when transferred knowledge is lost after training on later teachers. To better trade off between UKT and UKF, we propose Self External Data Distillation (SE2D), a method that preserves logits on external data to stabilize learning across heterogeneous teachers. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that SE2D reduces UKF and improves cross-domain generalization. The code and implementation for this work are publicly available at: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出持续蒸馏（CD）范式，让学生模型从不同领域的教师序列中学习，并设计SE2D方法缓解知识遗忘与跨域迁移问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度学习模型规模持续增长，存储多个教师模型成本高昂，且教师训练数据不可获取，亟需一种无需原始数据、能处理不同领域教师的知识蒸馏方法。
analysis.problem: 如何让学生模型从一系列不同领域的教师模型中顺序学习，且不保留早期教师数据，同时平衡未知知识迁移（UKT）与未知知识遗忘（UKF）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 外部无标签数据可实现未知知识迁移（UKT），但顺序蒸馏会导致未知知识遗忘（UKF），即从早期教师学到的知识在后续训练中丢失。
analysis.method: 提出Self External Data Distillation (SE2D)，在外部数据上保存教师logits，以稳定跨异构教师的学习过程，平衡UKT与UKF。
contributions: 提出持续蒸馏（CD）新范式，学生从不同领域的教师序列中学习，无需访问教师训练数据。
发现并定义未知知识遗忘（UKF）现象，并设计SE2D方法缓解遗忘、提升跨域泛化。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上验证SE2D能减少UKF并提升跨域泛化性能，代码已公开。
limitations: 依赖外部无标签数据，其质量可能影响效果。
未讨论教师模型数量极大时的扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: transfer learning, meta learning, and lifelong learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出持续蒸馏（CD）范式，让学生模型从不同领域的教师序列中学习，并设计SE2D方法缓解知识遗忘与跨域迁移问题。

papers.title: Constraint-Aware Execution Planning for Hybrid Space-Ground Compute Workloads
papers.abstract: Low Earth orbit (LEO) satellites increasingly carry compute hardware capable of on-board processing, yet each satellite generates roughly two orders of magnitude more data than it can downlink per orbit. This mismatch forces operators to decide, for every workload, which computation runs on-board and which runs on the ground, how intermediate data crosses the space-ground boundary through narrow contact windows, and how to maintain delivery guarantees over noisy channels. We present Constraint-Aware Execution (CAE), a planning system that takes a satellite identifier, a workload expressed as a directed acyclic graph of processing steps, and a set of orbital and resource constraints, and produces a deterministic, physically grounded execution plan. CAE operates in four phases: (1) orbital environment construction via SGP4 propagation with eclipse detection and ground station pass prediction, (2) compute placement using a cost model that compares on-board resource consumption against transfer overhead, (3) transfer insertion with adaptive forward error correction and security overhead modeling, and (4) greedy first-fit scheduling into orbital windows under power, thermal, compute, and communication constraints. We evaluate CAE against five representative workload patterns across satellites in distinct orbital regimes and demonstrate that the system produces feasible plans in under two seconds, correctly exploits onboard data reduction to minimize transfer volume, and adapts FEC and multi-pass allocation to varying channel conditions. CAE is deployed as a production API computing plans for any cataloged satellite using live two-line element data.

analysis.tldr: 提出约束感知执行规划系统CAE，为混合星地计算工作负载生成确定性物理可行执行计划。
analysis.research_motivation: 低轨卫星星上计算能力与下行链路带宽严重不匹配，每个轨道周期内卫星生成的数据量远超可下行传输量，迫使运营商必须优化星上计算与地面处理的分配、跨窄接触窗口的数据传输以及噪声信道下的交付保障。
analysis.problem: 如何为混合星地计算工作负载自动生成满足轨道、资源、功率、热控、通信等多重约束的确定性执行计划。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: CAE系统，包含四个阶段：1) 通过SGP4传播构建轨道环境（含食检测和地面站过境预测）；2) 基于成本模型的计算放置决策（比较星上资源消耗与传输开销）；3) 自适应前向纠错和安全开销建模的传输插入；4) 在功率、热控、计算和通信约束下进行贪心首次适应调度。
contributions: 提出CAE规划系统，将轨道传播、计算放置、传输插入和调度集成到一个统一框架中。
在多种轨道卫星和代表性工作负载模式上验证，系统可在2秒内生成可行计划，有效利用星上数据缩减减少传输量，并自适应调整FEC和多遍分配。
analysis.experiments: 在五种代表性工作负载模式上，针对不同轨道卫星进行评测，系统在2秒内生成可行计划，正确利用星上数据缩减最小化传输量，并适应不同信道条件调整FEC和多遍分配。
limitations: 可能未考虑多星协作或星座级全局优化。
贪心调度可能无法保证全局最优。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出约束感知执行规划系统CAE，为混合星地计算工作负载生成确定性物理可行执行计划。

papers.title: Segmenting proto-halos with vision transformers
papers.abstract: The formation of dark-matter halos from small cosmological perturbations generated in the early universe is a highly non-linear process typically modeled through N-body simulations. In this work, we explore the use of deep learning to segment and classify proto-halo regions in the initial density field according to their final halo mass at redshift z=0. We compare two architectures: a fully convolutional neural network (CNN) based on the V-Net design and a U-Net transformer. We find that the transformer-based network significantly outperforms the CNN across all metrics, achieving sub-percent error in the total segmented mass per halo class. Both networks deliver much higher accuracy than the perturbation-theory-based model \textsc{pinocchio}, especially at low halo masses and in the detailed reconstruction of proto-halo boundaries. We also investigate the impact of different input features by training models on the density field, the tidal shear, and their combination. Finally, we use Grad-CAM to generate class-activation heatmaps for the CNN, providing preliminary yet suggestive insights into how the network exploits the input fields.

analysis.tldr: 用视觉Transformer分割暗物质晕前身区域，性能远超CNN和微扰理论方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 暗物质晕的形成是高度非线性过程，传统N体模拟计算成本高，而基于微扰理论的方法精度有限，尤其在低质量晕和边界重建上。
analysis.problem: 从初始密度场中准确分割和分类暗物质晕前身区域，并预测其最终质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Transformer网络在所有指标上显著优于CNN，总分割质量误差低于1%；两种深度学习网络均远优于微扰理论模型pinocchio，尤其在低质量晕和边界重建上。
analysis.method: 对比V-Net CNN和U-Net Transformer两种架构，输入特征包括密度场、潮汐剪切及其组合，使用Grad-CAM进行可解释性分析。
contributions: 首次将视觉Transformer应用于暗物质晕前身分割，并证明其优于CNN和传统方法。
系统研究了不同输入特征（密度场、潮汐剪切）对分割精度的影响。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对z=0的最终晕质量，未考虑演化过程。
可解释性分析仅针对CNN，Transformer的决策机制未探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用视觉Transformer分割暗物质晕前身区域，性能远超CNN和微扰理论方法。
